tasks.label: backend-scoreboard-preflight
tasks.command: $openapi = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/openapi.json' -Method Get; $hasScoreboardPath = $openapi.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains '/api/scoreboard'; if (-not $hasScoreboardPath) { throw 'Missing /api/scoreboard in backend OpenAPI on port 8010.' }; $scoreboard = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/scoreboard?date=2026-07-07' -Method Get; if ($null -eq $scoreboard.games) { throw 'Scoreboard response missing games field.' }; Write-Output 'BACKEND_SCOREBOARD_PREFLIGHT_OK'

tasks.label: backend-props-preflight
tasks.command: $health = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/health' -Method Get; if ($health.status -ne 'ok') { throw 'Backend health check failed on port 8010.' }; $props = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/props' -Method Get; if ($null -eq $props.props) { throw 'Props response missing props field.' }; if (($props.props | Measure-Object).Count -lt 1) { throw 'Props response is empty.' }; $first = $props.props | Select-Object -First 1; $propId = if ($first.prop_id) { $first.prop_id } else { $first.id }; if (-not $propId) { throw 'First prop missing both prop_id and id.' }; Write-Output ('BACKEND_PROPS_PREFLIGHT_OK COUNT=' + (($props.props | Measure-Object).Count))

tasks.label: flutter-quick-run-windows
tasks.command: flutter pub get; flutter run -d windows --debug

tasks.label: flutter-safe-run-windows
tasks.command: flutter pub get; flutter run -d windows --debug --enable-software-rendering

tasks.label: flutter-final-debug-build
tasks.command: flutter clean; flutter pub get; dart format lib; flutter analyze; flutter test; flutter build windows --debug

tasks.label: flutter-release-build-validation
tasks.command: flutter clean; flutter pub get; flutter analyze; flutter test; flutter build windows --release

tasks.label: verify-line-movement-confidence-powershell
tasks.command: $payload = @{ legs = @(@{ prop_id='test-prop'; id='test-prop'; event_id='evt-1'; api_sports_game_id='evt-1'; player_id='p1'; custom_label=''; manual_note=''; player='Test Player'; sport='MLB'; matchup='A @ B'; prop_site='DraftKings'; sportsbook='DraftKings'; market='Total Bases'; line=1.5; current_line=1.5; side='OVER'; pick='OVER'; odds=0; current_odds=0; over_odds=$null; under_odds=$null; multiplier=1.5; win_probability=62; edge=58; confidence=62 }) }; $json = $payload | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 -Compress; try { $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/prop-builder/check-lines?refresh=false' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $json; Write-Output 'OK'; $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 -Compress | Write-Output } catch { Write-Output 'ERROR'; Write-Output $_.Exception.Message; if ($_.ErrorDetails.Message) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } }

tasks.label: inspect-port-8010-process
args: for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('netstat -ano ^| findstr :8010 ^| findstr LISTENING') do @echo PID=%a & wmic process where ProcessId=%a get ProcessId,Name,CommandLine /format:list

tasks.label: inspect-port-8010-process-ps
tasks.command: $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8010 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $listener) { Write-Output 'No listener on 8010'; exit 0 }; $pid = $listener.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID=$pid"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$pid" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: inspect-port-8010-owner
tasks.command: $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8010 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $listener) { Write-Output 'No listener on 8010'; exit 0 }; $ownerPid = $listener.OwningProcess; Write-Output "OWNER_PID=$ownerPid"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$ownerPid" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: validate-active-backend-main
tasks.command: Push-Location python_backend; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m py_compile main.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { 'PY_COMPILE_OK' }; Pop-Location

tasks.label: restart-backend-8010-stop
tasks.command: $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8010 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listener) { $ownerPid = $listener.OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $ownerPid -Force; Write-Output "STOPPED_PID=$ownerPid" } else { Write-Output 'NO_EXISTING_8010_LISTENER' }

tasks.label: benchmark-page-switching
tasks.command: $thresholdRaw = $env:PAGE_SWITCH_MAX_MS; $thresholdMs = 300; if ($thresholdRaw -and ($thresholdRaw -as [int])) { $thresholdMs = [int]$thresholdRaw }; $lines = flutter test test/ui_smoke_pass_test.dart 2>&1; $lines | Write-Output; $switch = $lines | Select-String 'page switch'; if (-not $switch) { throw 'No page switch timing lines found.' }; Write-Output '--- PAGE SWITCH TIMINGS ---'; $switch | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; $slow = @(); foreach ($entry in $switch) { $line = $entry.Line; if ($line -match 'in\s+(\d+)ms') { $duration = [int]$Matches[1]; if ($duration -gt $thresholdMs) { $slow += ($duration.ToString() + 'ms :: ' + $line) } } }; if ($slow.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output '--- PAGE SWITCH THRESHOLD FAILURES ---'; $slow | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; throw ('Page switch exceeded ' + $thresholdMs + 'ms threshold.'); }; Write-Output ('PAGE_SWITCH_BENCHMARK_OK threshold=' + $thresholdMs + 'ms')

tasks.label: verify-backend-category-payload
tasks.command: Push-Location python_backend; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "from services.prop_service import get_props; props = get_props(); first = props[0].model_dump(); print(f'COUNT={len(props)}'); print(f\"CATEGORY={first.get('category','')}\"); print(f\"MARKET_KEY={first.get('marketKey','')}\"); print(f\"MARKET={first.get('market','')}\")"; Pop-Location

tasks.label: verify-backend-category-payload-2
tasks.command: Push-Location python_backend; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "from services.prop_service import get_props; props = get_props(); first = props[0].model_dump(); print('COUNT=' + str(len(props))); print('CATEGORY=' + str(first.get('category', ''))); print('MARKET_KEY=' + str(first.get('marketKey', ''))); print('MARKET=' + str(first.get('market', '')))"; Pop-Location

tasks.label: verify-category-payload-final
args: from services.prop_service import get_props; props = get_props(); first = props[0].model_dump(); print('COUNT=' + str(len(props))); print('CATEGORY=' + str(first.get('category', ''))); print('MARKET_KEY=' + str(first.get('marketKey', ''))); print('MARKET=' + str(first.get('market', '')))

tasks.label: verify-category-payload-final-2
args: from services.prop_service import get_props; props = get_props(); first = props[0].model_dump(); print("COUNT=%s" % len(props)); print("CATEGORY=%s" % first.get("category", "")); print("MARKET_KEY=%s" % first.get("marketKey", "")); print("MARKET=%s" % first.get("market", ""))

tasks.label: sync-expanded-prop-markets
args: cd /d python_backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "from services.sync_service import sync_sport; print(sync_sport('basketball_wnba')); print(sync_sport('basketball_nba'))"

tasks.label: verify-live-prop-payload-api
tasks.command: $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/props' -Method Get; Write-Output ('COUNT=' + $resp.count); Write-Output ('FIRST_CATEGORY=' + $resp.props[0].category); Write-Output ('FIRST_MARKET_KEY=' + $resp.props[0].marketKey); Write-Output ('FIRST_MARKET=' + $resp.props[0].market)

tasks.label: verify-live-prop-payload-api-2
tasks.command: $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/props' -Method Get; Write-Output ('COUNT=' + $resp.count); Write-Output ('FIRST_CATEGORY=' + $resp.props[0].category); Write-Output ('FIRST_MARKET_KEY=' + $resp.props[0].marketKey); Write-Output ('FIRST_MARKET=' + $resp.props[0].market)

tasks.label: verify-scoreboard-date-slate
tasks.command: $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/scoreboard?date=2026-07-08' -Method Get; Write-Output ('GAME_COUNT=' + (($resp.games | Measure-Object).Count)); Write-Output ('LIVE_COUNT=' + (@($resp.games | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'LIVE' }).Count)); $resp.games | Select-Object -First 8 sport,status,away_team,home_team,start_time | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify-scoreboard-date-slate-2
tasks.command: $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/scoreboard?date=2026-07-08' -Method Get; Write-Output ('GAME_COUNT=' + (($resp.games | Measure-Object).Count)); Write-Output ('LIVE_COUNT=' + (@($resp.games | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'LIVE' }).Count)); $resp.games | Select-Object -First 8 sport,status,away_team,home_team,start_time | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: verify-scoreboard-date-slate-3
tasks.command: $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/scoreboard?date=2026-07-08' -Method Get; Write-Output ('GAME_COUNT=' + (($resp.games | Measure-Object).Count)); Write-Output ('LIVE_COUNT=' + (@($resp.games | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'LIVE' }).Count)); $resp.games | Select-Object -First 8 sport,status,away_team,home_team,start_time | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: probe-mlb-local-dates
args: from services.odds_service import fetch_scores; from main import _local_event_date; data=fetch_scores('baseball_mlb', days_from=3); rows=[(d.get('away_team'), d.get('home_team'), d.get('commence_time'), str(_local_event_date(d.get('commence_time'))), d.get('completed')) for d in data[:12]]; print(rows)

tasks.label: point-desktop-shortcut-to-installed-app
tasks.command: $desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('Desktop'); $shortcutPath = Join-Path $desktop 'PROP INTELLIGENCE.lnk'; $candidates = @('C:\Program Files\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe','C:\Program Files (x86)\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe',"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe"); $target = $candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { throw 'Installed packaged executable was not found in expected locations.' }; $shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $shortcut = $shell.CreateShortcut($shortcutPath); $shortcut.TargetPath = $target; $shortcut.WorkingDirectory = Split-Path $target; $iconCandidate = Join-Path (Split-Path $target) 'app_icon.ico'; if (Test-Path $iconCandidate) { $shortcut.IconLocation = $iconCandidate }; $shortcut.Save(); Write-Output ('SHORTCUT_UPDATED=' + $shortcutPath); Write-Output ('TARGET=' + $target)

tasks.label: point-desktop-shortcut-to-installed-app-2
tasks.command: $desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('Desktop'); $shortcutPath = Join-Path $desktop 'PROP INTELLIGENCE.lnk'; $localTarget = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe'; $candidates = @('C:\Program Files\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe','C:\Program Files (x86)\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence.exe',$localTarget); $target = $candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $target) { throw 'Installed packaged executable was not found in expected locations.' }; $shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $shortcut = $shell.CreateShortcut($shortcutPath); $shortcut.TargetPath = $target; $shortcut.WorkingDirectory = Split-Path $target; $iconCandidate = Join-Path (Split-Path $target) 'app_icon.ico'; if (Test-Path $iconCandidate) { $shortcut.IconLocation = $iconCandidate }; $shortcut.Save(); Write-Output ('SHORTCUT_UPDATED=' + $shortcutPath); Write-Output ('TARGET=' + $target)

tasks.label: point-desktop-shortcut-to-release-build
tasks.command: $desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('Desktop'); $shortcutPath = Join-Path $desktop 'PROP INTELLIGENCE.lnk'; $target = Join-Path $PWD 'build\windows\x64\runner\Release\prop_intelligence.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $target)) { throw 'Release executable not found.' }; $shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $shortcut = $shell.CreateShortcut($shortcutPath); $shortcut.TargetPath = $target; $shortcut.WorkingDirectory = Split-Path $target; $fallbackIcon = Join-Path $PWD 'windows\runner\resources\app_icon.ico'; if (Test-Path $fallbackIcon) { $shortcut.IconLocation = $fallbackIcon }; $shortcut.Save(); Write-Output ('SHORTCUT_UPDATED=' + $shortcutPath); Write-Output ('TARGET=' + $target)

tasks.label: full-backend-diagnostic-check
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Output '=== PORTS ==='; netstat -ano | Select-String ':8000|:8010|:8011' | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString().Trim() }; Write-Output '=== OWNER 8010 ==='; $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8010 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($listener) { $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ("ProcessId = " + $listener.OwningProcess); Write-Output ('PID=' + $listener.OwningProcess); if ($proc) { Write-Output ('CMD=' + $proc.CommandLine) } } else { Write-Output 'NO_8010_LISTENER' }; Write-Output '=== ENDPOINT HEALTH ==='; foreach ($p in 8000,8010,8011) { try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ("http://127.0.0.1:"+$p+"/health") -TimeoutSec 4; Write-Output ("PORT="+$p+" HEALTH="+($h|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) } catch { Write-Output ("PORT="+$p+" HEALTH_ERR="+$_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output '=== PROPS ORDER/PAST/IMAGES ==='; $resp=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/props?side=All&tier=All&minConfidence=0&sortBy=time' -TimeoutSec 20; $props=@($resp.props); $today=[DateTime]::Today; $parsed=@(); foreach($x in $props){ try { $dt=[DateTimeOffset]::Parse($x.startTimeUtc).ToLocalTime(); $parsed += [PSCustomObject]@{ dt=$dt; imagePath=$x.imagePath } } catch {} }; $hasPast = ($parsed | Where-Object { $_.dt.Date -lt $today } | Select-Object -First 1) -ne $null; $sorted=$true; for($i=1;$i -lt $parsed.Count;$i++){ if($parsed[$i].dt -lt $parsed[$i-1].dt){ $sorted=$false; break } }; $missingEmpty=($parsed | Where-Object { [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($_.imagePath) }).Count; Write-Output ('COUNT=' + $props.Count); Write-Output ('HAS_PAST=' + $hasPast); Write-Output ('SORTED_ASC=' + $sorted); Write-Output ('EMPTY_IMAGEPATH=' + $missingEmpty); Write-Output ('FILTERS=' + ($resp.filters | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)); Write-Output '=== SYNC ENDPOINT ==='; try { $sync = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/sync' -Method Post -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output ('SYNC_OK=' + ($sync | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $code=[int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; Write-Output ('SYNC_HTTP_STATUS=' + $code); try { $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $body=$sr.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output ('SYNC_BODY=' + $body) } catch {} } else { Write-Output ('SYNC_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } };

tasks.label: post-sync-sanity-check
args: $base='http://127.0.0.1:8010'; Write-Output '=== POST-SYNC PROPS ==='; $r=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ($base + '/api/props?side=All&tier=All&minConfidence=0&sortBy=time') -TimeoutSec 20; $today=[DateTime]::Today; $dates=@(); foreach($p in $r.props){ try { $dates += [DateTimeOffset]::Parse($p.startTimeUtc).ToLocalTime().DateTime } catch {} }; if($dates.Count -gt 0){ $min=($dates|Measure-Object -Minimum).Minimum; $max=($dates|Measure-Object -Maximum).Maximum; $hasPast=($dates|Where-Object { $_.Date -lt $today }|Select-Object -First 1) -ne $null; Write-Output ('COUNT='+$r.count); Write-Output ('MIN_LOCAL='+$min.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')); Write-Output ('MAX_LOCAL='+$max.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')); Write-Output ('HAS_PAST='+$hasPast) }; Write-Output '=== PROPS TEST ==='; try { $pt=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ($base + '/api/props-test') -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output ('PROPS_TEST=' + ($pt|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) } catch { Write-Output ('PROPS_TEST_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message) }; Write-Output '=== ALERTS ==='; try { $a=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ($base + '/api/prop-alerts') -TimeoutSec 10; $ac = if($a.alerts){ @($a.alerts).Count } else { 0 }; Write-Output ('ALERTS_COUNT=' + $ac) } catch { Write-Output ('ALERTS_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message) }

tasks.label: force-clear-8010-and-python
args: taskkill /IM python.exe /F | Out-Null; $left = netstat -ano | Select-String ':8010\s+.*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString().Trim() }; if ($left) { Write-Output 'LISTENERS:'; $left | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } } else { Write-Output 'PORT_8010_FREE' }

tasks.label: restart-backend-after-accuracy-fixes
args: taskkill /IM python.exe /F | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Push-Location 'c:\Users\theda\Projects\PROP INTELLIGENCE\prop_intelligence\python_backend'; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath '.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -ArgumentList '-m','uvicorn','main:app','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','8010'; Pop-Location; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $h=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/health' -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output ('HEALTH=' + ($h|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) } catch { Write-Output ('HEALTH_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message) }

tasks.label: validate-new-accuracy-fields
args: $resp=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/sync' -Method Post -TimeoutSec 180; Write-Output ('SYNC=' + ($resp|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)); $props=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/props?side=All&tier=All&minConfidence=0&sortBy=time' -TimeoutSec 30; $first=@($props.props | Select-Object -First 3 player,playerId,sourcePlayerId,canonicalPlayerId,playerIdentityConfidence,injuryStatus,lineupStatus,openingLine,currentLine,lineMovedAtUtc,lastUpdatedUtc,sourceProvider,recommendedSide,confidence,edgeSigned); Write-Output ('FIRST=' + ($first|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)); $movement=@($props.props | Where-Object { $_.openingLine -ne $null -and $_.currentLine -ne $null -and [math]::Abs([double]$_.openingLine - [double]$_.currentLine) -ge 0.01 } | Select-Object -First 5 player,market,openingLine,currentLine,lineMovedAtUtc); Write-Output ('MOVEMENT_SAMPLE=' + ($movement|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)); $audit=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/accuracy/audit' -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output ('AUDIT=' + ($audit|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 10));

tasks.label: validate-bulk-and-grouped-endpoints
args: $m=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/identity/map' -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output ('MAP_PROVIDERS=' + ($m.providers.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name -Join ',')); $u=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/identity/unresolved-grouped?sourceProvider=odds-api&limit=2000' -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output ('UNRESOLVED_GROUPED_COUNT=' + $u.count); Write-Output ('UNRESOLVED_SPORTS=' + (($u.sports.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name) -join ',')); $bulkBody = @{ players = @{ 'manual:test-player' = @{ injury_status='questionable'; lineup_status='bench'; notes='test' } } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; $b = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/player-availability/bulk?mode=merge' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $bulkBody -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output ('BULK_AVAIL=' + ($b | ConvertTo-Json -Compress));

tasks.label: inspect-main-line-bytes
tasks.command: $lines = Get-Content lib/main.dart; 3212..3230 | ForEach-Object { $line=$lines[$_-1]; Write-Output ('LINE ' + $_ + ': ' + $line); $bytes=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($line); Write-Output (($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' ') }
